items.headline: AMD (AMD) Buys MEXT To Tackle AI Data Center Memory Bottlenecks
items.summary: Advanced Micro Devices (NasdaqGS:AMD) has agreed to acquire MEXT, an AI native memory optimization company focused on data center workloads. The deal targets memory bottlenecks in enterprise and cloud AI environments, with MEXT's technology expected to be integrated into AMD's data center portfolio. The acquisition supports AMD's push to build a more complete AI infrastructure stack across both hardware and software layers. Advanced Micro Devices enters this deal with strong recent stock...

items.headline: Intel shares rise after Trump announces Apple partnership
items.summary:
STORY: ::Intel

::Archive

Shares of Intel rose as much as nearly 12% on Thursday, after U.S. President Donald Trump said the company would partner with Apple on chip design and production...

:: Intel

in what would be a major boost for Intel's efforts to turn around its business. 

A contract with Apple would lock in steady demand from the iPhone maker, boosting Intel's reputation and sales as it looks to close the gap with rival TSMC, the world's biggest contract chipmaker.

::Archive

::AMD

For Apple, the deal would help diversify its manufacturing base and add chip capacity at a time when TSMC, its key partner, has been stretched thin by surging demand from AI chip-making clients such as Nvidia and AMD.

Trump's social media post about the agreement did not specify which chips Intel would make for Apple.

The president said it was his latest effort to help Intel, in which the U.S. government has a 10% stake.

::Archive

The Trump administration has been stepping up efforts to secure U.S. supply chains for semiconductors and critical minerals, including taking equity stakes in companies to reduce reliance on China.

Apple and Intel did not immediately respond to Reuters requests for comment.
